description: Model a 30m x 20m flat-roofed commercial building with a 1.07m high parapet wall around the perimeter. The main building height should be 8m (so the parapet top is at 9.07m). Using the Skelion plugin, place a solar array on the inner roof surface. Configure the panels in Landscape orientation, 10-degree tilt, and 180° (South) azimuth. Critically, you must apply a 3.0-meter setback (margin) from all parapet walls to avoid shading. Save the completed model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\parapet_solar_project.skp' and export a top-down 2D graphic showing the layout to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\layout_plan.png'.
